decision.thought: The normalize function is incorrectly using max(scores) as the divisor, but it should be using the range (max - min) for proper min-max normalization. I will fix this by editing the normalize function.

arguments.new_body:
min_score = min(scores)
    max_score = max(scores)
    return [ (score - min_score) / (max_score - min_score) if max_score != min_score else 0.0 for score in scores ]
